The thing about Morimens is if you plan to seriously use a character in endgame arc2 hm, they rarely stay E0. Even if you pull E0 initially, they'll end up e? from monthly dupe selector anyways.

No character is must-have, all about how you build your team. Gmurph is indeed insane at E0. But E3 is a huge boost - essentially 1 extra arith and 2 draw each turn, or every 2 turns if super unlucky. Can do more, cycle deck faster, so on. If you’re pulling on the paid banners, do it on the ones with guaranteed astral reign character. Especially the chorus one. The realm specific banners only give faded legacy.
If you are trying to use them in raid, they are only 1 time use for it.
It was mentioned in the rules
You can use your teams and wheels again on the next raids, but you need another friend with support.
If you aren't talking about raid event, you need to be mutually added to use supports.

You mean I can never use it again forever and that it doesn't reset every day ?
Because I thought it did reset every day
Because yes it's for raids that I'm using them rn
Within raids only your awakeners and wheels are refreshed every day
As for the supports, if you used your friend's support, you won't be able to use it anymore within this raid and need to add more friends.

Should I get gDoll? The only healer I have pretty much is Doll
but I don't have Tawil, I think they go well together, right?
You don't really want to be building around healing since it struggles to keep up with damage at pretty much every point in the game.
GDoll does heal but that's not her main use
She's a hyperscaling support that excels in boss fights and has lots of utility with particular synergy in poison teams
You don't need to run her with Tawil at all. She'll slot into most teams just fine, especially at higher investment.

As for whether you should get her... she's decent at lower enlightenment but only becomes outright broken at OE.
If you want more bang for your buck, I would go with Kath, Castor, or GMurphy instead.

imo gDoll is pretty mediocre as a support(which needs at least E1), she's great at OE but it's a crazy amount of investment to put into a char unless you already have a strong account which if you're asking about healing is probably not the case

hey, i wanted to use this item but dont know the best use for it, it says i can use it on any wheel or character, but how does it actually work

Its a reset item for standard characters and wheels. It will remove the character/wheel from your account and give you standard selectors for each enlighten that character/wheel had. So you use it on a standard character you don't like, then use the selectors to pick a character you want. Also will refund any leveling mats you put into the character.
If I use it on a limited charcater or limited wheel, will I be able to claim any limited character or wheel as well?
no
Nope. You don't want to do that.
you only get the materials back if you use it on limited(like xp mats and ascension mats and skill mats)
Oh
so best to use it on standard for selectors, unless you already have everything OE then you can do whatever

Flares' guide has some general covenant info:
<https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1cC7FOebdy_J2hONmVT1QUSk6SxIRTuVoI4XADVlq5JU/edit?gid=525060342#gid=525060342>

and the Morimens glossary has tips on covenants for chars:
<https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/10UVim8m1SnY9fSDKfaH4AwnPPd22zsCDDNB6SV15yO4/edit?gid=167686509#gid=167686509>

Early on you probably won't be making specific covenants for specific characters and you'd just stack the most reasonable substat for each covenant. For example, Life Siphon is a keyflare covenant so you can just stack keyflare on it. April Praise is a crit rate/dmg covenant so you'd stack crit rate/dmg on it. Steppenwolf is an amp covenant so you stack, you guessed it, damage amp on it.

Its because like, i spent all my resources to get a good caro team because i really like caro. Like lvl 70 e4 doresain, e3 pickman, e3 Thais and OE faint, but then i see someone do like, double my max dmg with just a lvl 60 e3 kath

There are some characters that can use a specific covenant for interesting synergy, like Ryker with a crit rate Scarlet Embrace. I personally use a Twisted Twins Black with keyflare for my Clementine. But you don't really need to worry about this early on. Just focus on getting the good covenants with logical substats.
